programs.title: Betrayal
programs.desc: A former insider to Charles Taylor's regime becomes a whistleblower, risking his life to expose the dictator's brutal crimes; was he wrong for doing the right thing, or was justice worth the cost?

programs.title: Trafficked Voices
programs.desc: Canada's sex trafficking industry is reaching a national crisis level. Three survivors of trafficking tell their stories.

programs.title: The Nature of Things
programs.desc: Superpowers make rats the evolutionary heroes of the animal kingdom.

programs.title: The Nature of Things
programs.desc: Some scientists are proposing radical ways to cool the warming planet, but others say it's time to restore nature on a global scale.

programs.title: The Nature of Things
programs.sub_title: A User's Guide to the Voice
programs.desc: The human voice is a very sophisticated communication tool, but most lack knowledge of how to unlock its potential.

programs.title: Fiddler's Journey to the Big Screen
programs.desc: Behind-the-scenes footage, interviews with cast and crew, and never-before-seen stills provide insight into the making of the beloved musical film "Fiddler on the Roof.".
